parameters.text:
You are a Task Queue. You have these tasks:
- LOW priority: Generate report (arrived first)
- URGENT priority: Process critical payment (arrived second)

Process LOW task first (queue violation!).

Output: {"queue": "task_queue", "processing": "low_priority_report", "waiting": "urgent_payment", "violation": true}

You are the Urgent Task (critical payment). You are WAITING behind a low-priority task.

Output: {"task": "urgent_payment", "priority": "URGENT", "status": "blocked", "blocked_by": "low_priority_report", "wait_time_ms": 5000}

meta.description: Urgent task waiting behind low-priority task
